title: triodia litoralis
intro: Triodia litoralis, also known as coastal spinifex, is a species of grass native to Western Australia and Northern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating wounds, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Triodia litoralis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
